findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "proofrelay.wrap_mcp_tool_evidence" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "prompt:proofrelay.test_replay_rejection" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Guide an agent to confirm deterministic replay rejection without logging bearer tokens.

name: proofrelay.build_closing_proof_pack
description: Build a hash-only closing proof pack manifest from settlement, title, lender, funding, notary, disbursement, and approval hashes. The tool does not authorize closing or disbursement.

name: proofrelay.review_wire_payoff_change
description: Review hash-only wire, payoff, or disbursement change metadata for red flags and required controls without approving funds movement.

name: proofrelay.map_lender_condition_evidence
description: Map lender condition text, evidence, reviewer, and waiver hashes into a portable condition profile without satisfying lender conditions.

name: proofrelay.compute_readiness_signal
description: Compute a public-safe readiness signal from title, closing, wire, lender-condition, approval, exception, and risk hashes/counts. The tool does not certify readiness to close or fund.

name: proofrelay.adapt_agent_identity_evidence
description: Map Concordium, ERC-8004, DID, domain, wallet-controller, or IAM identity references into a hash-only PREP-3 input. ProofRelay accepts identity as evidence; it does not issue identity or certify people.

name: proofrelay.build_registry_entry
description: Build a public-safe ProofRelay Registry entry draft for an agent, API, MCP server, workflow, or adapter using only hashes and profile markers.

name: proofrelay.issue_conformance_badge
description: Build an unsigned ProofRelay evidence-conformance badge draft such as PREP-compatible, Verified Bundle, Verified MCP, or Replay Tested. This is not legal, security, model-safety, or platform certification.

name: proofrelay.verify_signed_attestation
description: Verify an Ed25519 signed ProofRelay artifact, such as a signed badge or proof envelope, using a public key and optional issuer/purpose pins. The tool never accepts private keys and does not sign caller claims.
